overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting two characters sitting on a snowy ledge overlooking a medieval town square with a central fountain, as snow falls gently and NPCs walk through the plaza in the background. The atmosphere is cold and contemplative with muted blue-grey tones.

segments.scene_description: Two characters sit on a snowy stone ledge overlooking a medieval town square during a snowfall at dusk. The scene features a central fountain and historic stone buildings in the background, with sparse pedestrian activity visible in the plaza. The atmosphere is quiet and contemplative as snow continues to fall gently over the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a quiet, contemplative moment on a snowy overlook that gradually reveals the scale of a medieval town square at dusk. It begins with a close focus on two characters sitting together on a cold stone ledge as snow falls gently around them. As the camera subtly shifts, the view expands to encompass the plaza below, highlighting a central fountain and the silhouettes of historic stone buildings. The scene then opens further to reveal sparse pedestrian activity moving through the square, blending the intimacy of the foreground with the muted blue-grey atmosphere of the town.
